title: Mythos is Back, OpenAI Releases GPT 5.6, Apple’s Price Increases
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss Anthropic's Mythos release, OpenAI's GPT-5.6 launch, government intervention in AI model access, cost pressures on frontier AI labs, transparency issues in billing, and Apple's price increases. They cover implications of model gating for open source AI and business models in the frontier AI sector.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy review a run of recent releases and industry shifts: Anthropic's Mythos, OpenAI's GPT-5.6 launch, and Apple's price increases. The discussion connects these to broader pressures on frontier AI labs, including cost optimization, transparency problems in billing, and government intervention in model access. Key threads include how model gating affects open source AI and what these dynamics mean for business models across the frontier sector, with attention to model evaluation and test-time compute.
